occurrence_sentence: "We are now well on our way to our revised, higher bookings expectations of $49 million to $56 million for the year. occurrence_sentence: IonQ published a manuscript with Oak Ridge National Laboratory on modeling the molecular structure of the benzene molecule, commonly used as an industrial solvent and as a benchmark to evaluate quantum chemistry algorithms.
